message:
test(rch): add timing history unit tests

Adds unit tests for the timing history infrastructure:

- test_timing_record_creation: Validates TimingRecord fields
- test_project_timing_data_add_sample: Verifies sample addition
  separates local vs remote correctly
- Additional tests for ring buffer behavior, median calculation,
  speedup ratio computation, and key generation

These tests validate the timing history implementation from the earlier
commit that added build timing tracking for intelligent offload gating.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
